title: polygala vulgaris var. alpestris
intro: Polygala vulgaris var. alpestris, also known as mountain milkwort, is a variety of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) that is native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various medicinal properties. The health benefits of mountain milkwort include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Mountain milkwort can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
